The '''Wookiee Trade Guild''' was a large [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]]-run corporation that controlled trade in the [[Kashyyyk system/Legends|Kashyyyk system]], based out of the [[Wawaatt Archipelago/Legends|Wawaatt Archipelago]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. Like other large trade guilds at the time, they maintained an [[Army of the Wookiee Trade Guild|private army]] to defend and enforce their assets. 

The Wookiee Trade Guild was dissolved in [[28 BBY/Legends|28 BBY]], when they resisted a [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] tax, resulting in the Federation quickly retaliating by [[Kashyyyk Trade Rebellion|obliterating]] their headquarters and most of their army.

==History==
[[File:Battle_of_Kashyyyk_BF1.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The Trade Federation strikes the Wookiee Trade Guild at their headquarters.]]
The Wookiee Trade Guild was formed by [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] to direct trade on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and around the [[Kashyyyk system/Legends|Kashyyyk system]]. The Wookiee Trade Guild was taxed by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] in [[28 BBY/Legends|28 BBY]], but resisted the taxation, much to the aggravation of the Federation. Under the leadership of [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], an army of 200 [[Trade Federation Droid Army/Legends|battle droids]]—[[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s, [[Droideka/Legends|droidekas]], [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|Vulture droids]], and the newly manufactured [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]]—were sent to Kashyyyk. The Wookiee Trade Guild deployed their [[Army of the Wookiee Trade Guild|army]] of 200 [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] they had amassed to fight off the droids. As a result, a [[Kashyyyk Trade Rebellion|battle]] began between the Guild's army and the Federation's droid forces. Eventually, the Guild's army was forced to surrender after the Trade Federation annihilated their headquarters.<ref name="bf" />

==Location==
The Wookiee Trade Guild operated in and around Kashyyyk, the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the Wookiee [[Species/Legends|species]]. They controlled trade around Kashyyyk. Their headquarters were located in a Trade Settlement around the [[Wawaatt Archipelago/Legends|Wawaatt Archipelago]], a group of [[Kashyyyk Islands|islands]] on the jungle planet.<ref name="bf" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Wookiee Trade Guild's first and only appearance was in the [[2004]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]''. They were featured in the third level of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] campaign, titled "Aggressive Negotiations". The battle that ended with their dissolution is played from the point of view of the Trade Federation's army, marking the in-game debut of the [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droid]].<ref name="bf" />
